PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,State,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,StartTime } | Format-Table -AutoSize)

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('match_data.json'\)\); from collections import Counter; c=Counter\(\); [c.update\([m.get\('date',''\)]\) for L in d.get\('leagues',[]\) for m in \(L.get\('matches'\) or []\) if m.get\('status'\)=='FT']; [print\(k, c[k]\) for k in sorted\(c\) if k >= '2026-04-20' and k <= '2026-04-26']")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('match_data.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); from collections import Counter; c=Counter\(\); [c.update\([m.get\('date',''\)]\) for L in d.get\('leagues',[]\) for m in \(L.get\('matches'\) or []\) if m.get\('status'\)=='FT']; [print\(k, c[k]\) for k in sorted\(c\) if k >= '2026-04-20' and k <= '2026-04-26']")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('match_data.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); from collections import Counter; c=Counter\(\); [c.update\([m.get\('date',''\)]\) for L in d.get\('leagues',[]\) for m in \(L.get\('matches'\) or []\) if m.get\('status'\)=='FT']; [print\(k, c[k]\) for k in sorted\(c\) if k]")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('match_data.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('total matches:', sum\(len\(L.get\('matches'\) or []\) for L in d.get\('leagues',[]\)\)\); print\('finished:', sum\(1 for L in d.get\('leagues',[]\) for m in \(L.get\('matches'\) or []\) if m.get\('status'\)=='FT'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./match_data.json'\);for\(const L of d.leagues\)for\(const m of \(L.matches||[]\)\){const h=m.home?.name||'',a=m.away?.name||'';if\(/Canada/i.test\(h\)&&/Bosnia/i.test\(a\)\){const pr=m.predictions||{};console.log\(m.date,m.status,'cards',pr.ou_cards?.result,'corners',pr.ou_corners?.result,'actuals.source',\(m.actuals||{}\).source,'cards_total',\(m.actuals||{}\).cards_total,'corners_total',\(m.actuals||{}\).corners_total\);}}")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./match_data.json'\);for\(const L of d.leagues\)for\(const m of \(L.matches||[]\)\){const h=m.home?.name||'',a=m.away?.name||'';if\(/Canada/i.test\(h\)&&/Bosnia/i.test\(a\)\){console.log\('id=',JSON.stringify\(m.id\),'date=',m.date,'time=',m.time,'status=',m.status,'settled_source=',m.settled_source\);console.log\('flashscore_score=',JSON.stringify\(m.flashscore_score\)\);console.log\('livescore_score=',JSON.stringify\(m.livescore_score\)\);console.log\('actuals=',JSON.stringify\(m.actuals\)\);console.log\('stat_backfill=',JSON.stringify\(m.stat_backfill\)\);}}")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./match_data.json'\);for\(const L of d.leagues\)for\(const m of \(L.matches||[]\)\){const h=m.home?.name||'',a=m.away?.name||'';if\(/Canada/i.test\(h\)&&/Bosnia/i.test\(a\)\){const p=m.predictions||{},ac=m.actuals||{};console.log\('source=',ac.source,'cards_total=',ac.cards_total,'-> ou_cards',p.ou_cards?.pick,p.ou_cards?.line,p.ou_cards?.result\);console.log\('corners_total=',ac.corners_total,'-> ou_corners',p.ou_corners?.pick,p.ou_corners?.line,p.ou_corners?.result\);}}")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./match_data.json'\);for\(const L of d.leagues\)for\(const m of \(L.matches||[]\)\){const h=m.home?.name||'',a=m.away?.name||'';if\(/Spain/i.test\(h\)&&/Cabo|Cape/i.test\(a\)\){console.log\('status',m.status,'score',m.home?.goals+'-'+m.away?.goals,'source',m.settled_source,'flashscore_score',JSON.stringify\(m.flashscore_score\)\);}}")

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Betting\\Soccer Stats"; $has7 = try { if \(\(Get-Content 'docs\\agent-system\\outputs\\routine_progress_latest.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).hasSevenDayForecast\) { 'True' } else { 'False' } } catch { 'ERR' }; $stuck = try { \(Get-Content 'docs\\agent-system\\outputs\\live_stuck_latest.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).stuck_count } catch { 'ERR' }; "hasSevenDayForecast=$has7"; "stuck_count=$stuck"; powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\\notify-toast.ps1 -Title "Soccer Stats test" -Message "No-touch routine notification path is working."; "notify exit=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -and $_.CommandLine -match "soccer_routine|soccer_|get-data-with-log|upload_match_data|cache_badges|run-python.js" } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, @{n='CmdLine';e={ $_.CommandLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(160, $_.CommandLine.Length\)\) }} | Format-List)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Betting\\Soccer Stats"; $deadline=\(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(140\); do { Start-Sleep 10 } while \(-not \(Select-String -Path "logs\\notouch_20260616_T052.log" -Pattern "=== done" -Quiet\) -and \(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); "--- final log ---"; Get-Content "logs\\notouch_20260616_T052.log" | Select-String -Pattern "STAGE|results succeeded|results failed|decision|=== done|exit=" | Select-Object -Last 20)

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);for\(const f of ['.env','.env.local']\){try{for\(const l of fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\).split\(/\\r?\\n/\)\){const k=l.split\('='\)[0].trim\(\);if\(/API_FOOTBALL|APISPORTS|THESPORTSDB|FOOTBALL_DATA|RAPID/i.test\(k\)\)console.log\(f+': '+k+' = '+\(l.split\('='\)[1]?'<set>':'<empty>'\)\)}}catch\(e\){}}")
